PAPI_AppLog_Docs — POST docs app-log beacon succeeds Run: N atomic77;API;NFR;Redundant
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 POST docs app-log beacon xAPI xPost api_base_url;api_applog_docs_endpoint;payload_empty_path 200 y PAPI_AppLog_Docs
2 Validate success flag xJSON xValidateJson success True y PAPI_AppLog_Docs 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: POST docs app-log beacon<br/>xAPI → xPost"]
    S1["2: Validate success flag<br/>xJSON → xValidateJson"]
    S0 --> S1

PAPI_Perf_Session — Auth session API response under perf threshold Run: Y atomic77;Performance;API
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Start API timer xUI xStartTimer y PAPI_Perf_Session
2 GET session endpoint xAPI xGet api_base_url;api_session_endpoint 401 y PAPI_Perf_Session
3 Stop API timer xUI xStopTimer elapsed_ms n PAPI_Perf_Session
4 Assert session API under threshold xUI xAssertLessThan {{step:3}};perf_max_api_ms y PAPI_Perf_Session 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Start API timer<br/>xUI → xStartTimer"]
    S1["2: GET session endpoint<br/>xAPI → xGet"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Stop API timer<br/>xUI → xStopTimer"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Assert session API under threshold<br/>xUI → xAssertLessThan"]
    S2 --> S3

PWeb_Perf_Docs_Load — Docs page load under perf threshold Run: Y atomic77;Performance;NFR
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open browser session xReuse PReuse_atomic77_OpenSite y PWeb_Perf_Docs_Load
2 Start load timer xUI xStartTimer y PWeb_Perf_Docs_Load
3 Navigate to docs xUI xNavigate docs_url y PWeb_Perf_Docs_Load
4 Stop load timer xUI xStopTimer elapsed_ms n PWeb_Perf_Docs_Load
5 Assert docs load under threshold xUI xAssertLessThan {{step:4}};perf_max_docs_ms y PWeb_Perf_Docs_Load

UI settings_heading_locator xpath=//h1[contains(.,'Settings')] xpath=//h1[contains(.,'Settings')] xpath=//h1[contains(.,'Settings')] xpath=//h1[contains(.,'Settings')] xpath=//h1[contains(.,'Settings')] xpath=//h1[contains(.,'Settings')]
UI dashboard_gifts_link_locator css=a[href*='gifts'] css=a[href*='gifts'] css=a[href*='gifts'] css=a[href*='gifts'] css=a[href*='gifts'] css=a[href*='gifts']
UI dashboard_add_family_link_locator css=a[href*='contacts/new'] css=a[href*='contacts/new'] css=a[href*='contacts/new'] css=a[href*='contacts/new'] css=a[href*='contacts/new'] css=a[href*='contacts/new']
UI dashboard_rewards_link_locator css=a[href*='/rewards'] css=a[href*='/rewards'] css=a[href*='/rewards'] css=a[href*='/rewards'] css=a[href*='/rewards'] css=a[href*='/rewards']
UI nav_faq_locator css=a[href*='faq'] css=a[href*='faq'] css=a[href*='faq'] css=a[href*='faq'] css=a[href*='faq'] css=a[href*='faq']
UI nav_signin_locator css=a[href*='login'] css=a[href*='login'] css=a[href*='login'] css=a[href*='login'] css=a[href*='login'] css=a[href*='login']
UI dashboard_empty_orders_locator xpath=//*[contains(.,'No orders yet')] xpath=//*[contains(.,'No orders yet')] xpath=//*[contains(.,'No orders yet')] xpath=//*[contains(.,'No orders yet')] xpath=//*[contains(.,'No orders yet')] xpath=//*[contains(.,'No orders yet')]
UI login_email_input_locator css=#email css=#email css=#email css=#email css=#email css=#email
UI login_password_input_locator css=#password css=#password css=#password css=#password css=#password css=#password
UI login_submit_btn_locator css=button[type='submit'] css=button[type='submit'] css=button[type='submit'] css=button[type='submit'] css=button[type='submit'] css=button[type='submit']
UI xss_payload <script>alert(1)</script> <script>alert(1)</script> <script>alert(1)</script> <script>alert(1)</script> <script>alert(1)</script> <script>alert(1)</script>

Design variables referenced in actions

DataNameUsed in plans (steps)
about_urlPWeb_Issue_About_404 #2 (Input)
add_family_urlPWeb_Issue_AddFamilyRoute_404 #2 (Input)
api_applog_home_endpointPAPI_AppLog_Home #1 (Input)
api_apps_endpointPAPI_Apps_Unauth #1 (Input)
api_base_urlPAPI_Manifest #1 (Input), PAPI_AuthSession_Unauth #1 (Input), PAPI_AppLog_Home #1 (Input), PAPI_Apps_Unauth #1 (Input), PAPI_InvalidLogin #1 (Input), PAPI_Robots #1 (Input), PAPI_Perf_Session #2 (Input)
api_login_endpointPAPI_InvalidLogin #1 (Input)
api_manifest_endpointPAPI_Manifest #1 (Input)
api_robots_endpointPAPI_Robots #1 (Input)
api_session_endpointPAPI_AuthSession_Unauth #1 (Input), PAPI_Perf_Session #2 (Input)
automations_urlPWeb_Issue_Automations_404 #2 (Input)
base_urlPReuse_ivvu_OpenSite #2 (Input), PWeb_OpenLanding #2 (Input), PWeb_VerifyTitle #2 (Input), PWeb_Home_Hero #2 (Input), PWeb_Nav_Pricing #2 (Input), PAPI_Manifest #1 (Input), PAPI_AuthSession_Unauth #1 (Input), PAPI_AppLog_Home #1 (Input), PAPI_Apps_Unauth #1 (Input), PAPI_InvalidLogin #1 (Input), PAPI_Robots #1 (Input), PWeb_Perf_Home_Load #3 (Input), PAPI_Perf_Session #2 (Input), PWeb_Link_Home_FAQ #2 (Input), PWeb_Link_Home_SignIn #2 (Input)
body_locatorPReuse_ivvu_OpenSite #3 (Input), PWeb_OpenLanding #3 (Input), PWeb_Sec_EvilQuery #2 (Input), PWeb_Link_Home_FAQ #4 (Input), PWeb_Sec_XSS_Login #5 (Input)
book_care_urlPWeb_Issue_BookCare_404 #2 (Input)
build_app_urlPWeb_Issue_BuildApp_404 #2 (Input)
care_heading_locatorPWeb_Care_Load #3 (Input)
care_urlPWeb_Care_Load #2 (Input), PWeb_Issue_BookCare_404 #2 (Input)
connected_apps_urlPWeb_Issue_ConnectedApps_404 #2 (Input)
contacts_new_heading_locatorPWeb_Link_Dashboard_ContactsNew #4 (Input)
dashboard_add_family_link_locatorPWeb_Link_Dashboard_ContactsNew #3 (Input)
dashboard_empty_orders_locatorPWeb_Elem_Dashboard_EmptyOrders #3 (Input)
dashboard_gifts_link_locatorPWeb_Link_Dashboard_Gifts #3 (Input)
dashboard_heading_locatorPWeb_Dashboard_Load #3 (Input), PWeb_Sec_Dashboard_Public #2 (Input)
dashboard_rewards_link_locatorPWeb_Link_Dashboard_Rewards #3 (Input)
dashboard_urlPWeb_Dashboard_Load #2 (Input), PWeb_Link_Dashboard_Gifts #2 (Input), PWeb_Link_Dashboard_ContactsNew #2 (Input), PWeb_Link_Dashboard_Rewards #2 (Input), PWeb_Sec_Dashboard_Public #1 (Input), PWeb_Elem_Dashboard_EmptyOrders #2 (Input)
docs_urlPWeb_Issue_Docs_404 #2 (Input)
evil_query_urlPWeb_Sec_EvilQuery #1 (Input)
faq_heading_locatorPWeb_FAQ_Load #3 (Input)
faq_urlPWeb_FAQ_Load #2 (Input)
forgot_heading_locatorPWeb_Forgot_Password #3 (Input)
forgot_password_urlPWeb_Forgot_Password #2 (Input)
gift_urlPWeb_Issue_Gift_404 #2 (Input), PWeb_Issue_SendGiftRoute_404 #2 (Input)
gifts_heading_locatorPWeb_Link_Dashboard_Gifts #4 (Input)
gifts_trending_locatorPWeb_Elem_Gifts_Trending #3 (Input)
gifts_urlPWeb_Elem_Gifts_Trending #2 (Input)
hero_locatorPWeb_Home_Hero #3 (Input)
login_email_input_locatorPWeb_Sec_XSS_Login #2 (Input)
login_password_input_locatorPWeb_Sec_XSS_Login #3 (Input)
login_submit_btn_locatorPWeb_Sec_XSS_Login #4 (Input)
login_urlPWeb_Login_Page #2 (Input), PWeb_Sec_XSS_Login #1 (Input)
login_welcome_locatorPWeb_Login_Page #3 (Input), PWeb_Link_Home_SignIn #4 (Input)
nav_faq_locatorPWeb_Link_Home_FAQ #3 (Input)
nav_pricing_locatorPWeb_Nav_Pricing #3 (Input)
nav_signin_locatorPWeb_Link_Home_SignIn #3 (Input)
not_found_heading_locatorPWeb_Issue_Docs_404 #3 (Input), PWeb_Issue_Profile_404 #3 (Input), PWeb_Issue_Shop_404 #3 (Input), PWeb_Issue_Gift_404 #3 (Input), PWeb_Issue_BookCare_404 #3 (Input), PWeb_Issue_SendGiftRoute_404 #3 (Input), PWeb_Issue_AddFamilyRoute_404 #3 (Input), PWeb_Issue_About_404 #3 (Input), PWeb_Issue_Automations_404 #3 (Input), PWeb_Issue_Onboarding_404 #3 (Input), PWeb_Issue_BuildApp_404 #3 (Input), PWeb_Issue_ConnectedApps_404 #3 (Input)

register_urlPWeb_Register_Page #2 (Input)
rewards_heading_locatorPWeb_Link_Dashboard_Rewards #4 (Input)

settings_urlPWeb_Sec_Settings_Public #1 (Input)

Action flow per plan (y2Actions)

PAPI_AppLog_Home — POST home app-log beacon succeeds Run: Y ivvu;API;NFR
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 POST home app-log beacon xAPI xPost api_base_url;api_applog_home_endpoint;payload_empty_path 200 y PAPI_AppLog_Home
2 Validate success flag xJSON xValidateJson success True y PAPI_AppLog_Home 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: POST home app-log beacon<br/>xAPI → xPost"]
    S1["2: Validate success flag<br/>xJSON → xValidateJson"]
    S0 --> S1
PAPI_Apps_Unauth — Protected apps API returns 401 without auth Run: Y ivvu;API;Security
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 GET apps API without auth xAPI xGet api_base_url;api_apps_endpoint 401 y PAPI_Apps_Unauth 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: GET apps API without auth<br/>xAPI → xGet"]
PAPI_AuthSession_Unauth — Unauthenticated session API returns 401 Run: Y ivvu;API;Security;Smoke
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 GET session without auth xAPI xGet api_base_url;api_session_endpoint 401 y PAPI_AuthSession_Unauth
2 Validate error_type in body xJSON xValidateJson error_type True y PAPI_AuthSession_Unauth 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: GET session without auth<br/>xAPI → xGet"]
    S1["2: Validate error_type in body<br/>xJSON → xValidateJson"]
    S0 --> S1
PAPI_InvalidLogin — Invalid login credentials rejected Run: Y ivvu;API;Security
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 POST invalid login credentials xAPI xPost api_base_url;api_login_endpoint;payload_invalid_login_path 400 y PAPI_InvalidLogin
2 Validate error_type in body xJSON xValidateJson error_type True y PAPI_InvalidLogin 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: POST invalid login credentials<br/>xAPI → xPost"]
    S1["2: Validate error_type in body<br/>xJSON → xValidateJson"]
    S0 --> S1
PAPI_Manifest — GET manifest.json returns PWA metadata Run: Y ivvu;API;Smoke
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 GET manifest.json xAPI xGet api_base_url;api_manifest_endpoint 200 y PAPI_Manifest
2 Validate manifest name field xJSON xValidateJson name True y PAPI_Manifest 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: GET manifest.json<br/>xAPI → xGet"]
    S1["2: Validate manifest name field<br/>xJSON → xValidateJson"]
    S0 --> S1
PAPI_Perf_Session — Auth session API response under perf threshold Run: Y ivvu;Performance;API
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Start API timer xUI xStartTimer y PAPI_Perf_Session
2 GET session endpoint xAPI xGet api_base_url;api_session_endpoint 401 y PAPI_Perf_Session
3 Stop API timer xUI xStopTimer elapsed_ms n PAPI_Perf_Session
4 Assert session API under threshold xUI xAssertLessThan {{step:3}};perf_max_api_ms y PAPI_Perf_Session 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Start API timer<br/>xUI → xStartTimer"]
    S1["2: GET session endpoint<br/>xAPI → xGet"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Stop API timer<br/>xUI → xStopTimer"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Assert session API under threshold<br/>xUI → xAssertLessThan"]
    S2 --> S3
PAPI_Robots — robots.txt is reachable Run: Y ivvu;API;NFR
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 GET robots.txt xAPI xGet api_base_url;api_robots_endpoint 200 y PAPI_Robots 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: GET robots.txt<br/>xAPI → xGet"]
PReuse_ivvu_OpenSite — Open browser and navigate to IVVU Run: N Reuse
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open browser xUI xOpenBrowser edge y PReuse_ivvu_OpenSite
2 Navigate to IVVU xUI xNavigate base_url y PReuse_ivvu_OpenSite
3 Verify page body xUI xGetText body_locator y PReuse_ivvu_OpenSite 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Open browser<br/>xUI → xOpenBrowser"]
    S1["2: Navigate to IVVU<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Verify page body<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S1 --> S2
PWeb_Care_Load — Care services page loads Run: Y ivvu;Smoke;Care
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open browser session xReuse PReuse_ivvu_OpenSite y PWeb_Care_Load
2 Navigate to care xUI xNavigate care_url y PWeb_Care_Load
3 Verify care services heading xUI xGetText care_heading_locator y PWeb_Care_Load 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Open browser session<br/>xReuse → PReuse_ivvu_OpenSite"]
    S1["2: Navigate to care<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Verify care services heading<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S1 --> S2
PWeb_Dashboard_Load — Dashboard page loads publicly Run: Y ivvu;Smoke;Dashboard
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open browser session xReuse PReuse_ivvu_OpenSite y PWeb_Dashboard_Load
2 Navigate to dashboard xUI xNavigate dashboard_url y PWeb_Dashboard_Load
3 Verify dashboard content xUI xGetText dashboard_heading_locator y PWeb_Dashboard_Load 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Open browser session<br/>xReuse → PReuse_ivvu_OpenSite"]
    S1["2: Navigate to dashboard<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Verify dashboard content<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S1 --> S2

PWeb_Perf_Home_Load — Home page load under perf threshold Run: Y ivvu;Performance;NFR
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId

Action flow per plan (y2Actions)

PNalanda_Launch_Health — Launch readiness — core routes reachable Run: Y NalandaApp;Launch;GoNoGo
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open site xReuse PReuse_NalandaApp_OpenSite y PNalanda_Launch_Health
2 Reset to home xUI xNavigate base_url y PNalanda_Launch_Health
3 Home title check xUI xGetTitle landing_title_expected y PNalanda_Launch_Health
4 Explore route xUI xNavigate explore_url y PNalanda_Launch_Health
5 Learning Path route xUI xNavigate learning_path_url y PNalanda_Launch_Health
6 Quiz route xUI xNavigate quiz_url y PNalanda_Launch_Health
7 AI Tutor route xUI xNavigate ai_tutor_url y PNalanda_Launch_Health
8 Final body check xUI xGetText body_locator y PNalanda_Launch_Health

Action flow per plan (y2Actions)

PJourney_Admin_Full — D2 admin panel all tabs back to arena Run: Y qoa2;Journey;Admin
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Navigate to login xUI xNavigate login_url y PJourney_Admin_Full
2 Enter admin email xUI xType login_email;login_email_input_locator y PJourney_Admin_Full
3 Enter admin password xUI xType login_password;login_password_input_locator y PJourney_Admin_Full
4 Submit admin login xUI xClick login_submit_btn_locator y PJourney_Admin_Full
5 Verify XP tracker xUI xGetText xp_tracker_header_locator y PJourney_Admin_Full
6 Dismiss onboarding xReuse PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding n PJourney_Admin_Full
7 Navigate to admin xUI xNavigate admin_url y PJourney_Admin_Full
8 Verify admin panel xUI xGetText admin_panel_title_locator Admin Panel y PJourney_Admin_Full
9 Open Clients tab xUI xClick admin_clients_tab_locator y PJourney_Admin_Full
10 Open Projects tab xUI xClick admin_projects_tab_locator y PJourney_Admin_Full
11 Open Consultants tab xUI xClick admin_consultants_tab_locator y PJourney_Admin_Full
12 Open XP Payments tab xUI xClick admin_xp_payments_tab_locator y PJourney_Admin_Full
13 Open Live Activity tab xUI xClick admin_live_activity_tab_locator y PJourney_Admin_Full
14 Open GTM tab xUI xClick admin_gtm_tab_locator y PJourney_Admin_Full
15 Verify admin panel still loaded xUI xGetText admin_panel_title_locator Admin Panel y PJourney_Admin_Full
16 Back to dashboard xUI xClick admin_back_dashboard_locator y PJourney_Admin_Full
17 Verify arena loaded xUI xGetText arena_title_locator Arena y PJourney_Admin_Full 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Navigate to login<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S1["2: Enter admin email<br/>xUI → xType"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Enter admin password<br/>xUI → xType"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Submit admin login<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S2 --> S3
    S4["5: Verify XP tracker<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S3 --> S4
    S5["6: Dismiss onboarding<br/>xReuse → PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding"]
    S4 --> S5
    S6["7: Navigate to admin<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S5 --> S6
    S7["8: Verify admin panel<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S6 --> S7
    S8["9: Open Clients tab<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S7 --> S8
    S9["10: Open Projects tab<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S8 --> S9
    S10["11: Open Consultants tab<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S9 --> S10
    S11["12: Open XP Payments tab<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S10 --> S11
    S12["13: Open Live Activity tab<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S11 --> S12
    S13["14: Open GTM tab<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S12 --> S13
    S14["15: Verify admin panel still loaded<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S13 --> S14
    S15["16: Back to dashboard<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S14 --> S15
    S16["17: Verify arena loaded<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S15 --> S16
PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub — Login arena social assistant avatar round-robin Run: Y qoa2;Journey;Dashboard
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Navigate to arena (session) xUI xNavigate arena_url y PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub
2 Verify session on arena xUI xGetText arena_title_locator Arena y PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub
3 Verify arena hub content xUI xGetText body_locator y PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub
4 Select Client avatar xUI xClick avatar_client_locator y PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub
5 Reset arena state xUI xNavigate arena_url y PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub
6 Select Consultant avatar xUI xClick avatar_consultant_locator y PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub
7 Reset arena state xUI xNavigate arena_url y PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub
8 Select Promoter avatar xUI xClick avatar_promoter_locator y PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub
9 Reset arena state xUI xNavigate arena_url y PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub
10 Select Nalanda avatar xUI xClick avatar_nalanda_locator y PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub
11 Verify arena still loaded xUI xGetText arena_title_locator Arena y PJourney_Arena_Social_Hub 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Navigate to arena (session)<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S1["2: Verify session on arena<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Verify arena hub content<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Select Client avatar<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S2 --> S3
    S4["5: Reset arena state<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S3 --> S4
    S5["6: Select Consultant avatar<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S4 --> S5
    S6["7: Reset arena state<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S5 --> S6
    S7["8: Select Promoter avatar<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S6 --> S7
    S8["9: Reset arena state<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S7 --> S8
    S9["10: Select Nalanda avatar<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S8 --> S9
    S10["11: Verify arena still loaded<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S9 --> S10
PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive — Invalid login then valid login to arena Run: Y qoa2;Journey;Auth
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open site (reuse) xReuse PReuse_qoa2_OpenSite y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
2 Navigate to register for login UI xUI xNavigate register_url y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
3 Verify login form visible xUI xGetText login_welcome_locator Welcome y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
4 Enter valid email for wrong-password test xUI xType login_email;login_email_input_locator y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
5 Enter wrong password xUI xType invalid_password;login_password_input_locator y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
6 Submit invalid login xUI xClick login_submit_btn_locator y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
7 Verify still on login xUI xGetText login_welcome_locator Welcome y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
8 Reset login form xUI xNavigate login_url y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
9 Enter valid email xUI xType login_email;login_email_input_locator y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
10 Enter valid password xUI xType login_password;login_password_input_locator y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
11 Submit valid login xUI xClick login_submit_btn_locator y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
12 Verify XP tracker xUI xGetText xp_tracker_header_locator y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
13 Dismiss onboarding xReuse PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding n PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
14 Navigate to arena xUI xNavigate arena_url y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive
15 Verify arena loaded xUI xGetText arena_title_locator Arena y PJourney_Auth_Negative_To_Positive 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Open site (reuse)<br/>xReuse → PReuse_qoa2_OpenSite"]
    S1["2: Navigate to register for login UI<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Verify login form visible<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Enter valid email for wrong-password test<br/>xUI → xType"]
    S2 --> S3
    S4["5: Enter wrong password<br/>xUI → xType"]
    S3 --> S4
    S5["6: Submit invalid login<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S4 --> S5
    S6["7: Verify still on login<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S5 --> S6
    S7["8: Reset login form<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S6 --> S7
    S8["9: Enter valid email<br/>xUI → xType"]
    S7 --> S8
    S9["10: Enter valid password<br/>xUI → xType"]
    S8 --> S9
    S10["11: Submit valid login<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S9 --> S10
    S11["12: Verify XP tracker<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S10 --> S11
    S12["13: Dismiss onboarding<br/>xReuse → PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding"]
    S11 --> S12
    S13["14: Navigate to arena<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S12 --> S13
    S14["15: Verify arena loaded<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S13 --> S14

PJourney_Landing_To_Arena — Verify arena session after login Run: Y qoa2;Journey;Smoke;Auth
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Navigate to arena (session) xUI xNavigate arena_url y PJourney_Landing_To_Arena

PJourney_XP_Gamification — Login expand XP read stats cross-check jobs Run: Y qoa2;Journey;XP
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Navigate to arena (session) xUI xNavigate arena_url y PJourney_XP_Gamification
2 Verify session on arena xUI xGetText arena_title_locator Arena y PJourney_XP_Gamification
3 Expand XP tracker xUI xClick xp_tracker_widget_locator y PJourney_XP_Gamification
4 Read total XP xUI xGetText xp_total_locator arena_xp n PJourney_XP_Gamification
5 Navigate to jobs xUI xNavigate jobs_url y PJourney_XP_Gamification
6 Expand XP on jobs xUI xClick xp_tracker_widget_locator y PJourney_XP_Gamification
7 Read jobs total XP xUI xGetText xp_total_locator jobs_xp n PJourney_XP_Gamification
8 Compare XP totals xMath xCompare {{step:4}};{{step:7}} True n PJourney_XP_Gamification 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Navigate to arena (session)<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S1["2: Verify session on arena<br/>xUI → xGetText"]

    S2["3: Expand XP tracker<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Read total XP<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S2 --> S3
    S4["5: Navigate to jobs<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S3 --> S4
    S5["6: Expand XP on jobs<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S4 --> S5
    S6["7: Read jobs total XP<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S5 --> S6
    S7["8: Compare XP totals<br/>xMath → xCompare"]
    S6 --> S7

PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding — Dismiss Welcome to QAonAir trainer overlay Run: N Reuse;Onboarding
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Advance onboarding slide 1 xUI xClick onboarding_next_locator n PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding
2 Advance onboarding slide 2 xUI xClick onboarding_next_locator n PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding
3 Advance onboarding slide 3 xUI xClick onboarding_next_locator n PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding
4 Finish onboarding carousel xUI xClick onboarding_next_locator n PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding

PReuse_qoa2_Login — Login to qoa2 with test credentials Run: N Reuse
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open site (reuse) xReuse PReuse_qoa2_OpenSite y PReuse_qoa2_Login
2 Navigate to login xUI xNavigate login_url y PReuse_qoa2_Login
3 Enter email xUI xType login_email;login_email_input_locator y PReuse_qoa2_Login
4 Enter password xUI xType login_password;login_password_input_locator y PReuse_qoa2_Login
5 Click Continue xUI xClick login_submit_btn_locator y PReuse_qoa2_Login
6 Verify logged-in XP tracker xUI xGetText xp_tracker_header_locator y PReuse_qoa2_Login
7 Dismiss onboarding trainer xReuse PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding n PReuse_qoa2_Login

    S1 --> S2

    S2 --> S3

PWeb_Admin_Login_Full — Full admin login reaches admin panel Run: Y qoa2;Admin;Auth;Login
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open site (reuse) xReuse PReuse_qoa2_OpenSite y PWeb_Admin_Login_Full
2 Navigate to login xUI xNavigate login_url y PWeb_Admin_Login_Full
3 Enter email xUI xType login_email;login_email_input_locator y PWeb_Admin_Login_Full
4 Enter password xUI xType login_password;login_password_input_locator y PWeb_Admin_Login_Full
5 Submit login xUI xClick login_submit_btn_locator y PWeb_Admin_Login_Full
6 Wait for post-login xUI xGetText xp_tracker_widget_locator y PWeb_Admin_Login_Full
7 Dismiss onboarding trainer xReuse PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding n PWeb_Admin_Login_Full
8 Navigate to admin xUI xNavigate admin_url y PWeb_Admin_Login_Full
9 Wait for admin panel xUI xGetText admin_panel_title_locator y PWeb_Admin_Login_Full
10 Dismiss overlay on admin xReuse PReuse_qoa2_Dismiss_Onboarding n PWeb_Admin_Login_Full
11 Verify admin panel xUI xGetText admin_panel_title_locator y PWeb_Admin_Login_Full

PWeb_Perf_BRAHL_Navigation — Measure BRAHL page navigation cycle time Run: Y qoa2;Performance;NFR;BRAHL
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open dashboard (reuse) xReuse PReuse_qoa2_Dashboard y PWeb_Perf_BRAHL_Navigation
2 Start timer xUI xStartTimer y PWeb_Perf_BRAHL_Navigation
3 Navigate Build xUI xNavigate build_url y PWeb_Perf_BRAHL_Navigation
4 Navigate Heal xUI xNavigate heal_url y PWeb_Perf_BRAHL_Navigation
5 Navigate Loop xUI xNavigate loop_url y PWeb_Perf_BRAHL_Navigation
6 Verify Loop page xUI xGetText body_locator n PWeb_Perf_BRAHL_Navigation
7 Stop timer xUI xStopTimer brahl_nav_time y PWeb_Perf_BRAHL_Navigation
8 Assert cycle under threshold xUI xAssertLessThan {{step:7}};perf_max_brahl_nav_ms y PWeb_Perf_BRAHL_Navigation 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Open dashboard (reuse)<br/>xReuse → PReuse_qoa2_Dashboard"]

    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Navigate Build<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S1 --> S2

    S2 --> S3
    S4["5: Navigate Loop<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S3 --> S4

    S4 --> S5
    S6["7: Stop timer<br/>xUI → xStopTimer"]
    S5 --> S6
    S7["8: Assert cycle under threshold<br/>xUI → xAssertLessThan"]
    S6 --> S7

5 Submit login xUI xClick login_submit_btn_locator y PWeb_Sec_SQLInjection_Login
6 Verify not logged in as admin xUI xGetText body_locator y PWeb_Sec_SQLInjection_Login

StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId

xp_heading_locatorPWeb_XP_Panel #5 (Input), PJ_P1_Head_cost_cli #4 (Input), PJ_P1_Head_cost_net #4 (Input), PJ_P2_Head_cost_cli #4 (Input), PJ_P2_Head_cost_net #4 (Input), PJ_P3_Head_cost_cli #4 (Input), PJ_P3_Head_cost_net #4 (Input), PJ_P4_Head_cost_cli #4 (Input), PJ_P4_Head_cost_net #4 (Input), PJ_P5_Head_cost_cli #4 (Input), PJ_P5_Head_cost_net #4 (Input), PJ_P6_Head_cost_cli #4 (Input), PJ_P6_Head_cost_net #4 (Input), PJ_P7_Head_cost_cli #4 (Input), PJ_P7_Head_cost_net #4 (Input), PJ_P8_Head_cost_cli #4 (Input), PJ_P8_Head_cost_net #4 (Input), PJ_P9_Head_cost_cli #4 (Input), PJ_P9_Head_cost_net #4 (Input)
ypad_explorer_locatorPPersona_P7_Journey #6 (Input), PWeb_Power_YpadExplorer #3 (Input), PJ_P1_Build_YpadTab #4 (Input), PJ_P2_Build_YpadTab #4 (Input), PJ_P5_Build_YpadTab #4 (Input), PJ_P6_Build_YpadTab #4 (Input), PJ_P7_Build_YpadTab #4 (Input), PJ_P9_Build_YpadTab #4 (Input)

PJ_P1_A77_Faq_brahl_cli — P1 A77 FAQ brahl Run: Y Journey;qoa_web;Regression;P1;Atomic77;FAQ;brahl
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Journey shell ready xReuse PReuse_J_P1_Shell_Client y PJ_P1_A77_Faq_brahl_cli
2 Open A77 xUI xClick nav_atomic77_btn y PJ_P1_A77_Faq_brahl_cli

4 Verify Baseline button xUI xGetText version_baseline_btn_locator Save latest Verify as baseline (old version) y PJ_P1_Build_BaselineBtn

1 Journey shell ready xReuse PReuse_J_P2_Shell_Client y PJ_P2_Nav_atomic77_cli
2 Click Atomic77 tab xUI xClick nav_atomic77_btn y PJ_P2_Nav_atomic77_cli
3 Wait for panel xTime xTimeWait 2 y PJ_P2_Nav_atomic77_cli
4 Verify Atomic77 nav label xUI xGetText nav_atomic77_btn A77 y PJ_P2_Nav_atomic77_cli 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Journey shell ready<br/>xReuse → PReuse_J_P2_Shell_Client"]
    S1["2: Click Atomic77 tab<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Wait for panel<br/>xTime → xTimeWait"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Verify Atomic77 nav label<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S2 --> S3

1 Journey shell ready xReuse PReuse_J_P4_Shell_Client y PJ_P4_A77_Faq_hunter_cli
2 Open A77 xUI xClick nav_atomic77_btn y PJ_P4_A77_Faq_hunter_cli
3 Wait xTime xTimeWait 2 y PJ_P4_A77_Faq_hunter_cli
4 Verify FAQ chip hunter xUI xGetText atomic77_faq_hunter_locator y PJ_P4_A77_Faq_hunter_cli 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Journey shell ready<br/>xReuse → PReuse_J_P4_Shell_Client"]
    S1["2: Open A77<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Wait<br/>xTime → xTimeWait"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Verify FAQ chip hunter<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S2 --> S3

3 Wait for panel xTime xTimeWait 2 y PJ_P4_Nav_atomic77_net
4 Verify Atomic77 nav label xUI xGetText nav_atomic77_btn A77 y PJ_P4_Nav_atomic77_net

1 Journey shell ready xReuse PReuse_J_P5_Shell_Client y PJ_P5_Head_run_cli
2 Open Run xUI xClick nav_run_btn y PJ_P5_Head_run_cli
3 Wait xTime xTimeWait 2 y PJ_P5_Head_run_cli
4 Verify Run heading xUI xGetText run_heading_locator Run — FoXYiZ fEngine2 y PJ_P5_Head_run_cli 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Journey shell ready<br/>xReuse → PReuse_J_P5_Shell_Client"]
    S1["2: Open Run<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Wait<br/>xTime → xTimeWait"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Verify Run heading<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S2 --> S3

1 Journey shell ready xReuse PReuse_J_P7_Shell_Client y PJ_P7_A77_Faq_idea_cli
2 Open A77 xUI xClick nav_atomic77_btn y PJ_P7_A77_Faq_idea_cli
3 Wait xTime xTimeWait 2 y PJ_P7_A77_Faq_idea_cli
4 Verify FAQ chip idea xUI xGetText atomic77_faq_idea_locator y PJ_P7_A77_Faq_idea_cli

    S2["3: Wait<br/>xTime → xTimeWait"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Verify FAQ chip idea<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S2 --> S3

    S1["2: Start at loop<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Wait<br/>xTime → xTimeWait"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Go to brahl<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S2 --> S3
    S4["5: Wait<br/>xTime → xTimeWait"]
    S3 --> S4
    S5["6: Verify status bar<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S4 --> S5
PJ_P7_Cycle_run_to_analyze — P7 BRAHL cycle run → analyze Run: Y Journey;qoa_web;Regression;P7;BRAHL;Cycle;run;analyze
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Journey shell ready xReuse PReuse_J_P7_Shell_Client y PJ_P7_Cycle_run_to_analyze
2 Start at run xUI xClick nav_run_btn y PJ_P7_Cycle_run_to_analyze
3 Wait xTime xTimeWait 1 y PJ_P7_Cycle_run_to_analyze
4 Go to analyze xUI xClick nav_analyze_btn y PJ_P7_Cycle_run_to_analyze
5 Wait xTime xTimeWait 2 y PJ_P7_Cycle_run_to_analyze
6 Verify status bar xUI xGetText status_bar_locator y PJ_P7_Cycle_run_to_analyze

    S2 --> S3

1 Journey shell ready xReuse PReuse_J_P7_Shell_Client y PJ_P7_Head_heal_cli
2 Open Heal xUI xClick nav_heal_btn y PJ_P7_Head_heal_cli
3 Wait xTime xTimeWait 2 y PJ_P7_Head_heal_cli
4 Verify heal control xUI xGetText btn_shrink_locator Shrink to failures (Loop 2 prep) y PJ_P7_Head_heal_cli 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Journey shell ready<br/>xReuse → PReuse_J_P7_Shell_Client"]
    S1["2: Open Heal<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Wait<br/>xTime → xTimeWait"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Verify heal control<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S2 --> S3

PReuse_J_P3_Shell_Networker — Journey shell P3 as Networker Run: Y Journey;Reuse;P3;networker
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open site xReuse PReuse_qoa_web_OpenSite y PReuse_J_P3_Shell_Networker
2 Load persona profile xUI xNavigate profile_url y PReuse_J_P3_Shell_Networker
3 Wait for profile xTime xTimeWait 3 y PReuse_J_P3_Shell_Networker

5 Select Networker avatar xUI xClick avatar_networker_bar_btn y PReuse_J_P3_Shell_Networker
6 Wait after avatar xTime xTimeWait 2 y PReuse_J_P3_Shell_Networker

Plans (y1Plans)

PlanId PlanName DesignId Run Tags Output
PReuse_qoa_web_OpenSite Open browser and navigate to BRAHL Web D1 N Reuse site_loaded
PReuse_PersonaReady Sign in test persona via profile URL D1 N Reuse;Persona persona_ready
PReuse_qoa_web_ClientReady Persona ready as Client with qoa_web project D1 N Reuse;Client client_ready

senior_banner_expectedPPersona_P4_Journey #6 (Expected), PWeb_Hitl_TierBanner #3 (Expected)
signin_creator_pitch_expectedPWeb_Signin_CreatorPitch #3 (Expected)
signin_creator_pitch_locatorPWeb_Signin_CreatorPitch #3 (Input)
signin_hunter_pitch_expectedPWeb_Signin_HunterPitch #3 (Expected)
signin_hunter_pitch_locatorPWeb_Signin_HunterPitch #3 (Input)
signin_profiles_heading_expectedPWeb_Signin_Profiles #2 (Expected)
signin_profiles_heading_locatorPWeb_Signin_Profiles #2 (Input)
signin_urlPWeb_Signin_CreatorPitch #2 (Input), PWeb_Signin_HunterPitch #2 (Input), PWeb_Signin_Page #2 (Input), PWeb_Signin_Profiles #1 (Input)
topbar_project_label_locatorPReuse_qoa_web_ClientReady #3 (Input)
topbar_project_selected_locatorPWeb_Topbar_Project #2 (Input)
topbar_suite_expectedPWeb_Topbar_Project #2 (Expected)
version_baseline_btn_expectedPWeb_Version_BaselineBtn #3 (Expected)
version_baseline_btn_locatorPWeb_Version_BaselineBtn #3 (Input)
version_launch_section_expectedPWeb_Version_LaunchSection #3 (Expected)
version_launch_section_locatorPWeb_Version_LaunchSection #3 (Input)
xp_heading_expectedPWeb_XP_Panel #5 (Expected)
xp_heading_locatorPWeb_XP_Panel #5 (Input)
ypad_explorer_locatorPPersona_P7_Journey #6 (Input), PWeb_Power_YpadExplorer #3 (Input)

Action flow per plan (y2Actions)

PAPI_Health — GET api health Run: Y Verify;qoa_web;Smoke;API
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 GET health xAPI xGet api_base_url;api_health_endpoint 200 y PAPI_Health 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: GET health<br/>xAPI → xGet"]

StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId

flowchart LR
    S0["1: GET profiles.js<br/>xAPI → xGet"]

StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 GET consultant projects xAPI xGet api_base_url;api_projects_consultant_endpoint 200 y PAPI_ProjectsConsultant

    S0["1: GET consultant projects<br/>xAPI → xGet"]
PAPI_Signin — GET sign-in page Run: Y Verify;qoa_web;API;Signin
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 GET signin xAPI xGet api_base_url;api_signin_endpoint 200 y PAPI_Signin

PAPI_Suites — GET api suites Run: Y Verify;qoa_web;API
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId

PPersona_P1_Journey — P1 client MVP journey Build tab Run: Y Verify;Persona;P1;Journey
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 P1 ready xReuse PReuse_qoa_web_ClientReady y PPersona_P1_Journey
2 Reload profile URL xUI xNavigate profile_url y PPersona_P1_Journey
3 Wait for profile xTime xTimeWait 4 y PPersona_P1_Journey
4 Verify P1 chip xUI xGetText profile_chip_code_locator persona_code y PPersona_P1_Journey
5 Open refine section xUI xClick build_refine_summary_locator y PPersona_P1_Journey
6 Verify budget xUI xGetText budget_block_locator Budget y PPersona_P1_Journey 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: P1 ready<br/>xReuse → PReuse_qoa_web_ClientReady"]
    S1["2: Reload profile URL<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Wait for profile<br/>xTime → xTimeWait"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Verify P1 chip<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S2 --> S3
    S4["5: Open refine section<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S3 --> S4
    S5["6: Verify budget<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S4 --> S5
PPersona_P2_Journey — P2 dual role profile chip and avatars Run: Y Verify;Persona;P2;Journey
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 P2 ready xReuse PReuse_PersonaReady y PPersona_P2_Journey
2 Reload profile URL xUI xNavigate profile_url y PPersona_P2_Journey
3 Wait for profile xTime xTimeWait 4 y PPersona_P2_Journey
4 Verify P2 chip xUI xGetText profile_chip_code_locator persona_code y PPersona_P2_Journey
5 Click HITL xUI xClick avatar_hitl_bar_btn y PPersona_P2_Journey
6 Click Build xUI xClick nav_build_btn y PPersona_P2_Journey
7 Verify QA Hunter panel xUI xGetText build_consultant_panel_locator consultant_panel_heading_expected y PPersona_P2_Journey

    S0["1: P2 ready<br/>xReuse → PReuse_PersonaReady"]
    S1["2: Reload profile URL<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Wait for profile<br/>xTime → xTimeWait"]
    S1 --> S2

    S2 --> S3

    S3 --> S4

PlanId PlanName DesignId Run Tags Output
PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite Open browser and navigate to Sunshine D1 N Reuse site_loaded
PReuse_sunshine_Home Open site and reset to home D1 N Reuse site_home
PReuse_sunshine_Admin Store Admin PIN unlock D2 N Reuse;Admin admin_ready
PWeb_OpenLanding Open Sunshine landing page D1 Y sunshine;Smoke;Landing landing_loaded

PWeb_VerifyNav Verify main navigation links D1 Y sunshine;Smoke;Navigation nav_verified
PWeb_Home_Hero Verify home hero and tagline D1 Y sunshine;Smoke;Landing hero_ok
PWeb_Admin_Store_Access Store Admin PIN opens post-PIN gate D2 Y sunshine;Admin;Smoke admin_access_ok
PWeb_Admin_Dashboard Verify post-PIN login gate after admin reuse D2 Y sunshine;Admin;Issue admin_gate_ok
PWeb_Ordering_Flow Verify grocery ordering steps on home D1 Y sunshine;Landing ordering_flow_ok

PWeb_Nav_Salon Navigate to salon via nav D1 Y sunshine;Salon;Navigation salon_nav_ok
PWeb_Nav_Track Navigate to track order via nav D1 Y sunshine;Track;Navigation track_nav_ok

Action flow per plan (y2Actions)

PReuse_sunshine_Admin — Store Admin PIN unlock Run: N Reuse;Admin
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open site (reuse) xReuse PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite y PReuse_sunshine_Admin
2 Click Store Admin xUI xClick store_admin_btn_locator y PReuse_sunshine_Admin
3 Enter admin PIN xUI xType admin_password;admin_pin_input_locator y PReuse_sunshine_Admin
4 Submit admin access xUI xClick admin_unlock_btn_locator y PReuse_sunshine_Admin
5 Verify post-PIN gate xUI xGetText admin_post_pin_locator y PReuse_sunshine_Admin 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Open site (reuse)<br/>xReuse → PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite"]
    S1["2: Click Store Admin<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Enter admin PIN<br/>xUI → xType"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Submit admin access<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S2 --> S3
    S4["5: Verify post-PIN gate<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S3 --> S4
PReuse_sunshine_Home — Open site and reset to home Run: N Reuse
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open browser session xReuse PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite y PReuse_sunshine_Home
2 Ensure on home page xUI xNavigate base_url y PReuse_sunshine_Home 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Open browser session<br/>xReuse → PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite"]
    S1["2: Ensure on home page<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S0 --> S1
PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite — Open browser and navigate to Sunshine Run: N Reuse
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open browser xUI xOpenBrowser edge y PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite
2 Navigate to Sunshine xUI xNavigate base_url y PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite
3 Verify page body xUI xGetText body_locator y PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Open browser<br/>xUI → xOpenBrowser"]
    S1["2: Navigate to Sunshine<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Verify page body<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S1 --> S2
PWeb_About_Content — About page story and hours Run: Y sunshine;About
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Navigate to about xUI xNavigate about_url y PWeb_About_Content
2 Verify about heading xUI xGetText about_heading_locator y PWeb_About_Content
3 Verify our story section xUI xGetText about_story_locator y PWeb_About_Content 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Navigate to about<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S1["2: Verify about heading<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Verify our story section<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S1 --> S2
PWeb_Admin_Dashboard — Verify post-PIN login gate after admin reuse Run: Y sunshine;Admin;Issue
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Navigate to login gate xUI xNavigate login_url y PWeb_Admin_Dashboard
2 Verify post-PIN login gate xUI xGetText login_welcome_locator y PWeb_Admin_Dashboard 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Navigate to login gate<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S1["2: Verify post-PIN login gate<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S0 --> S1
PWeb_Admin_Store_Access — Store Admin PIN opens post-PIN gate Run: Y sunshine;Admin;Smoke
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open browser session xReuse PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite y PWeb_Admin_Store_Access
2 Reset to home page xUI xNavigate base_url y PWeb_Admin_Store_Access
3 Click Store Admin xUI xClick store_admin_btn_locator y PWeb_Admin_Store_Access
4 Enter admin PIN xUI xType admin_password;admin_pin_input_locator y PWeb_Admin_Store_Access
5 Submit admin access xUI xClick admin_unlock_btn_locator y PWeb_Admin_Store_Access
6 Verify post-PIN gate xUI xGetText admin_post_pin_locator y PWeb_Admin_Store_Access 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Open browser session<br/>xReuse → PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite"]
    S1["2: Reset to home page<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Click Store Admin<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Enter admin PIN<br/>xUI → xType"]
    S2 --> S3
    S4["5: Submit admin access<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S3 --> S4
    S5["6: Verify post-PIN gate<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S4 --> S5
PWeb_Checkout_Empty — Checkout shows empty cart state Run: Y sunshine;Shop;Checkout
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Navigate to checkout xUI xNavigate checkout_url y PWeb_Checkout_Empty
2 Verify empty cart message xUI xGetText checkout_empty_locator y PWeb_Checkout_Empty 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Navigate to checkout<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S1["2: Verify empty cart message<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S0 --> S1
PWeb_Forgot_Password — Forgot password link navigation Run: Y sunshine;Auth;Password
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Navigate to login xUI xNavigate login_url y PWeb_Forgot_Password
2 Click forgot password link xUI xClick forgot_password_link_locator y PWeb_Forgot_Password
3 Verify page loaded xUI xGetText body_locator y PWeb_Forgot_Password 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Navigate to login<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S1["2: Click forgot password link<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Verify page loaded<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S1 --> S2
PWeb_Home_Hero — Verify home hero and tagline Run: Y sunshine;Smoke;Landing
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open browser session xReuse PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite y PWeb_Home_Hero
2 Reset to home page xUI xNavigate base_url y PWeb_Home_Hero
3 Verify hero heading xUI xGetText home_hero_locator y PWeb_Home_Hero 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Open browser session<br/>xReuse → PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite"]
    S1["2: Reset to home page<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Verify hero heading<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S1 --> S2
PWeb_Home_Order_CTA — Home Order Groceries CTA reaches shop Run: Y sunshine;Shop;Landing
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Open browser session xReuse PReuse_sunshine_OpenSite y PWeb_Home_Order_CTA
2 Reset to home page xUI xNavigate base_url y PWeb_Home_Order_CTA
3 Navigate to shop xUI xNavigate shop_url y PWeb_Home_Order_CTA
4 Verify shop gate xUI xGetText guest_gate_heading_locator y PWeb_Home_Order_CTA

PWeb_Sec_XSS_Login — XSS in login email handled safely Run: Y sunshine;Security;Auth
StepId StepInfo ActionType ActionName Input Output Expected Critical PlanId
1 Navigate to login xUI xNavigate login_url y PWeb_Sec_XSS_Login
2 Enter XSS in email xUI xType xss_payload;login_email_input_locator y PWeb_Sec_XSS_Login
3 Enter password xUI xType admin_password;login_password_input_locator y PWeb_Sec_XSS_Login
4 Submit login xUI xClick login_submit_btn_locator y PWeb_Sec_XSS_Login
5 Verify page body safe xUI xGetText body_locator y PWeb_Sec_XSS_Login 
flowchart LR
    S0["1: Navigate to login<br/>xUI → xNavigate"]
    S1["2: Enter XSS in email<br/>xUI → xType"]
    S0 --> S1
    S2["3: Enter password<br/>xUI → xType"]
    S1 --> S2
    S3["4: Submit login<br/>xUI → xClick"]
    S2 --> S3
    S4["5: Verify page body safe<br/>xUI → xGetText"]
    S3 --> S4
